location: Graceful Finance is building financial and software products to enable older adults to unlock their $11 trillion of home wealth, so people can age in place and with dignity. Whilst people are real estate rich, they are in need of cash to absorb financial shocks they experience in retirement, such as the death of a spouse, healthcare needs or home repairs. Graceful Finance will change the quality and comfort of lives for millions of our older loved ones.

location: Ojje is at the forefront of a storytelling revolution, fusing education, entertainment, and cutting-edge technology. Harnessing the power of AI, we breathe life into bespoke narratives, letting children star in their own adventures or select their personal heroes. Our innovative fusion of digital and print media creates more than a reading experience - it's an interactive, immersive entertainment journey. At Ojje, we're not just instilling a love for reading; we're transforming it into an adventure playground, merging reading with interactive fun. Our mission? To captivate, inspire, and entertain the next generation through the enchanting power of personalized storytelling.

With PowerX, users save on energy expenses, utilities save by using water heaters as batteries for load balancing, and private grid companies pay for usage data

name: Wharf fka Dots
location: Dots (YC S21) helps companies interact with customers through their Slack or Discord customer communities in order to increase retention and drive revenue. Email is overloaded, and companies are already using chat communities to interact with customers. We enable b2b companies to scale interactions by automating manual tasks, such as DM-ing members, and analyzing the activity of key accounts.Companies such as Lattice, Confluent, On Deck and Culture Amp are using Dots already, and we have grown 40% MoM during YC. Sanket (ex-McKinsey) and Pranav (Princeton CS) are technical co-founders, and have been close friends since high school. Here's our product hunt launch.
